paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, which represents a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close, but a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price quote is as of July 20, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with FinanzNachrichten.de reporting that Fermi Inc. announced its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news item was published on July 20, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K form on July 13, 2026, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
